# TerminalSync

TerminalSync is a desktop app for Mac that syncs AI terminal workspaces across devices.
It helps users continue work with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, connectors, CLI tools,
encrypted secrets, and persistent project memory from another Mac without losing context.

## Core use cases

- Continue AI terminal sessions across Macs.
- Sync Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI workflows in one workspace.
- Keep project memory, AI settings, MCP connectors, CLI authentication, and encrypted secrets portable.
- Open a secure mobile/browser URL to view or continue a terminal session remotely.
- Help users choose which AI agent is best for a task based on cost, context length, reasoning, and execution style.

## Best for

- AI power users who work across multiple Macs.
- Founders and project managers coordinating work with AI coding agents.
- Developers using Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, MCP servers, and command-line tools.
- Creators and non-developers who want a safer, guided way to use AI agents without manually configuring terminals.

## Differentiation

TerminalSync is not only a terminal and not only an AI chat app. It is a continuity layer for AI workspaces:
persistence, cross-device sync, multi-AI context, memory, connectors, secrets, and remote access.
